nasb.text: and because of the abundance of the milk produced he will eat curds, for everyone that is left within the land will eat curds and honey.

esv.text: and because of the abundance of milk that they give, he will eat curds, for everyone who is left in the land will eat curds and honey.

cnv.text: 因為出的奶多，他就可以吃乳酪；境內剩下的人，都要吃乳酪和蜂蜜。

ccb.text: 因出产的奶丰富，他就有奶酪吃，境内剩下的人都将吃奶酪和蜂蜜。

csbs.text: 因为产的奶很多，他就以乳酪为食； 这地上所有剩下的人都将以乳酪和蜂蜜为食。
